page_title: Zankoku na Tenshi no These - EVANGELION 30th Anniversary Edition LP
text:
is a LP vinyl disc by Yoko Takahashi in order to commemorate the 30th anniversary of the EVANGELION series. The LP vinyl disc was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number NAS-2165 for the regular edition and NAS-2164 for the limited edition. It was released on 21 February 2026. https://www.kingrecords.co.jp/cs/g/gNAS-2165/ The jacket was illustrated by Ikuto Yamashita.

Tracklist

Staff

Trivia

The design of Evangelion Unit-01 featured in the jacket is an altered version of the Evangelion Test Type-01 with modified arm arm guards, horn and different coloring to the hand palms.
